大小单双兼职.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239092256_64493522<br>vk.com/topic-239149259_64945873<br>vk.com/topic-239100471_65820525<br>vk.com/topic-238898559_64945878<br>vk.com/topic-239049173_64338150<br>vk.com/topic-239056836_64493523<br>vk.com/topic-239136399_64945880<br>vk.com/topic-239100476_64493524<br>vk.com/topic-239066396_64493526<br>vk.com/topic-239149177_65606585<br>vk.com/topic-239142236_64493527<br>vk.com/topic-239149150_65228881<br>vk.com/topic-239100578_64668134<br>vk.com/topic-239149381_65820529<br>vk.com/topic-239061454_64166455<br>vk.com/topic-239061326_64493529<br>vk.com/topic-239061496_64493528<br>vk.com/topic-239149392_64780265<br>vk.com/topic-239090029_64945883<br>vk.com/topic-239149139_64945882<br>vk.com/topic-239149166_64493532<br>vk.com/topic-239137466_64493532<br>vk.com/topic-239149253_64338157<br>vk.com/topic-239136408_64668138<br>vk.com/topic-239052703_64338158<br>vk.com/topic-239110206_64493538<br>vk.com/topic-239058796_64493536<br>vk.com/topic-239100513_64338161<br>vk.com/topic-239153717_65606588<br>vk.com/topic-239061318_64668137<br>vk.com/topic-239153623_64338155<br>vk.com/topic-239124896_64493537<br>vk.com/topic-239136301_65820530<br>vk.com/topic
